productName: Torus - ROSIN COLD CURE - Cereal Milk #6 - 1g
description: This hybrid rosin is the connoisseur's clean dab: Cereal Milk coaxed into honey-gold oil by heat and pressure alone, with nothing washed out and nothing added in. A premium solventless experience, with notes of butter, vanilla, and sweet, delivering a balanced head-and-body experience.
